subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the Ancient Beauty and Thy Most Great Name, through which Thy sovereignty hath been exalted among the nations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بجمال القدم و اسمک الأعظم الذی به استعلی سلطنتک علی الأمم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
